channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: DA's Governance Challenges: Corruption and Power Dynamics
item.description: The article examines the Democratic Alliance's (DA) internal conflicts and the broader implications of corruption in governance. It highlights allegations against Resolve Communications, a firm linked...

item.title: Young Girl Seriously Injured After Falling From 11th-Floor Apartment Balcony
item.description: A young girl was severely injured Saturday morning after falling from an 11th-floor balcony in Ottawa, according to paramedics. The incident occurred at a building on Alta Vista Drive, where the child...

item.title: Calgary Stampede Celebrates Alberta’s Western Heritage
item.description: The Calgary Stampede, an iconic annual event in Alberta, serves as more than just a rodeo—it is a vibrant celebration of the province's rich western heritage and cultural identity. This year’s edition...

item.title: Severe Weather Disrupts America 250th Celebrations as Trump Announces D.C. Speech

item.title: Gert-Johan Coetzee's Creative Interpretations of Country Allure for Durban July 2026
item.description: Celebrated designer Gert-Johan Coetzee redefined fashion for the Hollywoodbets Durban July 2026, presenting two striking couture creations that reinterpret the theme 'Country Allure' through contrasti...

item.title: Monsoon remains in active phase over central India
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has stated that a well-marked low-pressure area over the northwest Bay of Bengal will keep the monsoon in an 'active phase' over central India for the next 4-...

item.title: Experts Split on Brayden Maynard's Umpire Contact Penalty
item.description: The AFL community is in turmoil following a contentious incident involving player Brayden Maynard and an umpire. Experts across the league are divided over whether Maynard should face disciplinary act...

item.title: England's World Cup clash with Mexico: Tuchel's insights on security and altitude challenges

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Crowd Incident During Canada-Morocco Match

item.title: DPWH urged to finalize Abra de Ilog-Paluan Road project in Occidental Mindoro

item.title: Black Market Dollar to Naira Rates for July 5th, 2026
item.description: The article reports on the current dollar-to-naira exchange rates in Nigeria's black market (Aboki fx) as of July 5th, 2026. According to sources at Bureau De Change (BDC), Lagos Parallel Market playe...

item.title: Morocco's World Cup 2026 Quarter-Final Run and Financial Rewards
item.description: Morocco made history by reaching the quarter-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, defeating Canada 3-0 in a dominant performance. The Atlas Lions, led by stars like Azzedine Ounahi and Brahim Diaz, show...

item.title: Two men face legal consequences after stolen card shopping spree in Dublin
item.description: Two men, Nixon Marian Malinte (36) and Ionut Cozma (40), have been barred from specific areas of Dublin city following accusations of using a stolen bank card for a €5,000 shopping spree. The defendan...

item.title: Kenyans Debate Resemblance Between Love Island USA Contestant Aniya Harvey and First Daughter Charlene Ruto
item.description: A viral TikTok video has sparked a heated online debate in Kenya, with many claiming that Love Island USA contestant Aniya Harvey bears a striking resemblance to President William Ruto's daughter, Cha...

item.title: Airwallex founder Jack Zhang confident in navigating US scrutiny amid growth
item.description: Airwallex founder Jack Zhang is confident he can navigate ongoing criticism from the United States regarding the fintech company's alleged ties to China. Despite facing scrutiny over its $11 billion v...

item.title: Young Australian Bull Riders Head to Global Competition
item.description: A group of young bull riders from Australia is preparing to compete in the Youth Bull Riding World Finals in the United States. The article highlights their rigorous training, the challenges they face...

item.title: Lilian Odira Wins 800m at Prefontaine Classic, Earns $20,000 Prize
item.description: World champion Lilian Odira secured victory in the women's 800m at the Prefontaine Classic in Eugene, Oregon, defeating Olympic champion Keely Hodgkinson with a season's best time of 1:56.19. The race...

item.title: Middle East tensions escalate as funeral of Iranian Supreme Leader Khamenei unfolds
item.description: The funeral of Iran's late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has become a focal point of geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, with U.S. President Donald Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benja...

item.title: Lok Sabha to Review Inquiry Report on Justice Varma's Allegations
item.description: The Lok Sabha Speaker, Om Birla, announced that the inquiry report against Justice Yashwant Varma, a former Allahabad High Court judge, will be tabled in the upcoming monsoon session starting July 20....

item.title: IHC Finalizes Three Nominees for Judicial Vacancies
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) has finalized three candidates for vacant judge positions, with their names forwarded to the Judicial Commission of Pakistan (JCP) for scrutiny under new 2026 rules. The...
